allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\chap1\\Downloads\\ddddd" -Recurse -Exclude "node_modules","dist",".git" | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|dist|\\.git" } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\chap1\\Downloads\\ddddd" -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|dist|\\.git|\\.claude" } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\chap1" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\.\(jpg|jpeg|png|webp\)$' -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-2\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table FullName, Length, LastWriteTime)
